name: Pumpkin Empanadas - Sl 10/82
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine pumpkin, 3/4 cup sugar, and allspice; stir well, and set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, 1/2 cup sugar, baking powder, and salt. Cut in shortening with a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
3. Sprinkle 1 cup milk evenly over the surface; stir with a fork until all dry ingredients are moistened. Form into a ball; chill.
4. Roll out to 1/8-inch thickness. Cut into 4-inch circles.
5. Place about 1 tablespoon pumpkin mixture in the center of each circle.
6. Moisten edges with additional milk, fold in half, and press edges together with a fork.
7. Brush empanadas with egg white; place on ungreased baking sheets.
8. Bake at 450°F for 8 to 10 minutes or until golden. Combine 1/4 cup sugar and cinnamon; sprinkle over empanadas while still warm.
9. Yield: about 1-1/2 dozen.
